lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: The sea suits you, Alice. You look radiant today.

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: Oh, stop it... You're just saying that.

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: I mean it. I've traveled many places, but none compare to this moment... here, with you.

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: You know... I've always dreamed of this. Sailing the open sea with you, my adventurer. Finally, we're doing it together!

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: Just don't blame me if we get seasick!

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: Hey! I'm tougher than I look!

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: I know. That's why I love you.

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: No matter what happens... we'll always be together. Right?

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: Always. I'll stand by your side, no matter what.

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: What the—? Those clouds came out of nowhere!

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: A storm! Alex, it's coming so fast!

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: It's okay! We'll get through this! Just stay close to me!

lines.name: Alice
lines.dialog: I'm scared! Alex, I don't want to—

lines.name: Alex
lines.dialog: Look at me! Alice, look at me! I promised, didn't I? I won't let anything happen to you!
